questions.q: Which Canadian province announced a ban on social media and AI chatbots for youth, marking a first in Canada?
Following a landslide election defeat, Viktor Orbán announced he is stepping down from his parliamentary seat in which country?
According to a recent NBC News report, which country caused more extensive damage to U.S. military bases than the Pentagon had publicly acknowledged?
The government of which country stated that two U.S. federal agents recently killed in a car crash were not authorized to participate in local operations?
The IDF recently launched an investigation into a video showing its soldiers destroying solar panels in a Christian village located in which country?
